title: Enphase Posts 42% Revenue Decline in 2024
text: Enphase Energy experienced 42% revenue decline in 2024 as residential solar market slumped significantly. Full-year revenues fell almost $1 billion compared with 2023 down from $2.29 billion to $1.33 billion. Company announced 500 job cuts and abandoned manufacturing contract in Mexico in response to market challenges. Strategy focused on doubling down on U.S. manufacturing for microinverters and batteries. European operations faced particularly severe headwinds with 15% Q3 decline versus Q2 and 34% decreased product sell-through. Q3 2024 showed 34% quarter-over-quarter sell-through decrease in Europe with further risks anticipated in 2025 especially concerning France which had been strong region.
